bell.title: Agent notifications
bell.heading: Notifications
bell.emptyLine2: Run the Lithe agent or a coding agent to track it here.

explainError.label: Explain the last error
explainError.text: Explain the last error in the terminal.

generateCommand.label: Generate a command
generateCommand.hint: Tell me what you want to do

summarizeBuffer.label: Summarize buffer
summarizeBuffer.text: Summarize what just happened in the terminal.

context.footerLastRequest: Last request reflects current context size; session totals are cumulative.

empty.title: Ask Lithe anything
empty.description: Lithe sees the active terminal - cwd, recent commands, and output.

toolApproval.edits_one: {{count}} edit · review in the diff tab
toolApproval.edits_other: {{count}} edits · review in the diff tab

composer.placeholder: Ask Lithe anything   -   # for snippets and commands, @ for files

statusBar.noFavorites: No favorites yet - star a model to pin it here.

chat.emptyDescription: Explain command output, fix errors, generate snippets, or run a task.
chat.continuePrompt: Continue from where you stopped. Don't recap - just keep going.
chat.contextCompacted_one: Context compacted - {{count}} older tool result elided to save tokens.
chat.contextCompacted_other: Context compacted - {{count}} older tool results elided to save tokens.
chat.hitStepLimit: Hit the step limit. Continue to keep going.

whisper.loopbackOnly: Whisper.cpp must run on a loopback address (localhost or 127.x.x.x) to keep transcription local.
whisper.openaiKeyMissing: OpenAI API key is not configured
whisper.groqKeyMissing: Groq API key is not configured

picker.noMatches: No matches. Add snippets in Settings → Agents.
picker.largeWorkspace: Workspace is large - refine your query to narrow results.

errors.fallback: The AI provider rejected the request. Check the selected model and provider settings, then try again.
errors.noApiKey: No API key configured for {{provider}}. Open Settings → Models to add one.
errors.compatibleBaseUrlMissing: OpenAI-compatible provider has no base URL. Set it in Settings → Models.
errors.endpointModelMissing: {{name}}: no model id set. Open Settings → Models.
errors.lmstudioModelMissing: LM Studio: no model id set. Open Settings → Models and enter the model id loaded in LM Studio.
errors.mlxModelMissing: MLX: no model id set. Open Settings → Models and enter the model id served by mlx_lm.server.
errors.ollamaModelMissing: Ollama: no model id set. Open Settings → Models and enter the model id (e.g. the name from `ollama list`).
errors.compatibleModelMissing: OpenAI-compatible: no model id set. Open Settings → Models.
errors.openrouterModelMissing: OpenRouter: no model id set. Open Settings → Models and enter an OpenRouter model id.
errors.autocompleteModelMissing: No autocomplete model id set for {{provider}}.

desc.coder: General-purpose coding assistant. Writes, edits, and runs.
desc.architect: Design and tradeoffs. Plans before code.
desc.reviewer: Reviews diffs for correctness, perf, security.

aiModels.modelDesc.gpt-5.5-pro: Highest-accuracy version for the hardest professional and agentic tasks.
aiModels.modelDesc.gpt-5.4-nano: Tiny and instant - great for autocomplete.
aiModels.modelDesc.gpt-5.3-codex: Tuned for code and tool use.
aiModels.modelDesc.claude-opus-4-8: Anthropic's most capable model for complex reasoning and long-horizon agentic coding.
aiModels.modelDesc.claude-sonnet-4-6: Sweet spot of quality and speed.
aiModels.modelDesc.gemini-3.1-flash-lite: Extremely fast, cheap, and lightweight multimodal model.
aiModels.modelDesc.grok-4.20-non-reasoning: Fast tier for chat and tools.
aiModels.modelDesc.grok-4-fast-reasoning: Cheaper Grok 4 with vision and reasoning.
aiModels.modelDesc.grok-4.3: Most intelligent and fastest Grok. Strong agentic tool use and 1M context.
aiModels.modelDesc.grok-build-0.1: Specialized fast coding model for agentic workflows (powers Grok Build CLI).
aiModels.modelDesc.mistral-medium-latest: Good balance of speed and intelligence.
aiModels.modelDesc.llama3.3-70b: Meta's open model on wafer-scale silicon.
aiModels.modelDesc.openrouter-custom: Any model on OpenRouter by id.
aiModels.modelDesc.lmstudio-local: Local GGUF models via LM Studio.

close.fileUnsaved: This file has unsaved changes. Close anyway?
close.closeTerminalDescription: A process is running. Closing this tab will terminate it.
close.fileDeletedUnsavedNamed: "{{title}}" has unsaved changes. The file has been deleted. Close anyway?
close.fileDeletedUnsaved: This file has unsaved changes. The file has been deleted. Close anyway?
close.filesDeletedUnsaved_one: {{count}} file has unsaved changes. They have been deleted. Close all anyway?
close.filesDeletedUnsaved_other: {{count}} files have unsaved changes. They have been deleted. Close all anyway?
close.quitDescription: A process is still running in a terminal. Quitting will terminate it.

workspace.unsavedBeforeSwitch: Save or close unsaved editor tabs before switching workspace.

ui.placeholderDefault: Type a command, > for history, # to find in files
ui.dialogDescription: Run a command, switch theme, or search your workspace.
ui.openTerminalForHistory: Open a terminal to run history
ui.noCommandsFound: No commands found. Type ? to see search modes.

editor.newFileDescription: Filename (relative to workspace root). The extension determines the language mode.
editor.formatOnSaveSkippedDescription: No active language server for this file. Enable one in the statusbar, or pick Biome/Prettier in Settings.
editor.languageServerNoFormatter: The active language server has no formatter. Pick an external one in Settings (Ruff for Python, Prettier, rustfmt, ...).
editor.fileChangedOnDiskDescription: {{name}} was modified by another program while you had unsaved changes. Overwrite to keep your version.
editor.diffPreviewUnavailable: Diff preview is not available for this file.
editor.customFormatCommandMissing: No custom format command configured in Settings.

explorer.partialResults: Showing partial results - refine your query.

lsp.notFoundOnPath: Lithe found no {{command}} on your PATH. Install it, then check again:

markdown.binaryCannotRender: Binary file - cannot render as markdown.

preview.xfoHint: Many public sites refuse to embed (X-Frame-Options). If the page is blank, open it externally.

suspended.title: Preview suspended
suspended.description: Released to free memory after sitting in the background.

empty.title: Nothing to preview yet
empty.description: Type a URL above, or open the <ports>Ports</ports> dropdown to jump straight to your running dev server. Public sites often block embedding - open them in your browser via the link icon if you see a blank page.

addressBar.enterUrlNotice: Enter a URL or pick a port preset.

appearance.label: Appearance
appearance.seeThemes: For theme, background and customization, see the Themes tab.

language.label: Language
language.description: Display language for the Lithe interface.

showHidden.title: Show hidden files
showHidden.description: Include dot-prefixed files and folders (.env, .gitignore, .config) in the file explorer and search.

gitDecorations.title: Git decorations
gitDecorations.description: Tint changed files and dim gitignored entries in the file explorer.

webgl.title: Use WebGL renderer
webgl.tooltip: xterm's WebGL renderer caches glyphs in a GPU texture atlas. On some macOS setups (especially with Nerd Fonts), the atlas corrupts and terminal text becomes unreadable. Turn this off as a fallback - performance dips slightly, but text renders correctly via the DOM renderer.
webgl.description: Hardware-accelerated rendering. Turn off if text shows corruption or blank tiles.

cursorBlink.title: Cursor blinking
cursorBlink.description: Blink the terminal cursor. Off by default for lower idle CPU, matching VS Code and the macOS terminal.

fontFamily.title: Font family
fontFamily.description: Nerd Font name for icons (e.g. "CaskaydiaCove Nerd Font Mono"). Leave blank to auto-detect.

shell.title: Integrated terminal shell
shell.descriptionNonIntegrated: Command blocks and directory tracking are unavailable for this shell.
shell.descriptionWsl: Shell for the integrated terminal. WSL spaces use the distro login shell. Existing tabs keep their shell.
shell.descriptionDefault: Shell for new terminal tabs. Existing tabs keep their shell.

workspaceEnv.title: Workspace environment
workspaceEnv.description: Where new spaces run, terminal and AI agent alike: Windows or a WSL distro. Existing spaces keep theirs; switch any from the status bar.

letterSpacing.title: Letter spacing
letterSpacing.description: Extra horizontal space between characters (px). Use negative values to tighten Nerd Fonts.

scrollback.title: Scrollback
scrollback.description: Lines of history kept per terminal. Higher uses more RAM (~3 KB / line).

notifications.title: Coding agent notifications
notifications.description: Alert when Claude Code or Codex running in a terminal needs your input or finishes. Desktop notification when Lithe is unfocused, in-app otherwise.

launchAtLogin.title: Launch at login
launchAtLogin.description: Open Lithe automatically when you sign in.

restoreWindow.title: Restore window position & size
restoreWindow.description: Reopen the main window where you left it. Applies on next launch.

header.title: Editor
header.description: Editing behavior, saving, and language servers.

vimMode.title: Vim mode
vimMode.description: Enable Vim keybindings in the code editor.

wordWrap.title: Word wrap
wordWrap.description: Wrap long lines instead of scrolling horizontally.

autoSave.title: Auto save
autoSave.description: Automatically save files after a delay when changes are detected.

autoSaveDelay.title: Auto save delay
autoSaveDelay.description: Delay before unsaved changes are saved automatically.

formatOnSave.title: Format on save
formatOnSave.description: Format the file on explicit save (Cmd+S / :w) with the formatter below.

formatter.title: Formatter
formatter.description: Language server formats the buffer before writing; Biome and Prettier run on the saved file from your PATH.

customCommand.title: Custom command
customCommand.description: Runs on the saved file; {file} is replaced with the quoted path (appended when omitted).

overrides.title: Language overrides
overrides.description: Use a different formatter for specific languages (e.g. Ruff for Python).

editorTheme.label: Editor theme
editorTheme.description: Syntax colors for the code editor. Auto follows the app theme.

background.label: Background
background.dropHint: Drop an image here or pick one. Stored locally; doesn't affect the default look until set.
background.storageBlocked: Image storage is blocked by another Lithe window.
background.storageFull: Not enough storage to save this image. Remove unused themes or backgrounds and try again.
background.animatedTooLarge: Animated images are limited to {{limit}} MB to keep things smooth. This one is {{size}}.
background.imageTooLarge: Images are limited to {{limit}} MB. This one is {{size}}.
background.decodeFailed: This image couldn't be decoded. Try a different file.
background.encodeUnavailable: Image encoding is unavailable in this environment.

validation.themeObject: Theme must be a JSON object
validation.unknownColorKey: {{path}} is not a recognized color key
validation.ansiArray: {{path}} must be an array of 16 strings
validation.idFormat: id must be a kebab-case string (a-z, 0-9, -)
validation.nameRequired: name must be a non-empty string
validation.variantsRequired: variants must contain at least one of: light, dark

resetDialog.title: Reset all shortcuts?
resetDialog.description: This will revert all your custom keyboard shortcuts to their factory defaults. This action cannot be undone.

header.title: Models
header.description: Connect the providers you use. Keys live in your OS keychain and are used only by Lithe.

voice.title: Voice input
voice.descOpenai: Uses your official OpenAI API key and the Whisper model for transcription.
voice.descGroq: Uses your official Groq API key and Groq's Whisper endpoint for transcription.
voice.descWhispercpp: Connects to a local Whisper.cpp server for fully offline transcription.

providers.label: Providers
providers.emptyHint: Click "Add provider" to connect a cloud or local model source.

ollamaCloud.loading: Loading the official model catalog and context windows…
ollamaCloud.loadFailed: Could not load the official Ollama Cloud model catalog.
ollamaCloud.partial: Loaded the catalog, but {{count}} context windows could not be refreshed.
ollamaCloud.viewCatalog: View model catalog and context windows

local.lmstudioDescription: Run GGUF models via LM Studio's HTTP server (Developer tab → enable).
local.lmstudioHint: The model id loaded in LM Studio - see the server's /v1/models page.
local.mlxDescription: Apple-silicon inference via mlx_lm.server (pip install mlx-lm).
local.mlxHint: The Hugging Face repo path you launched mlx_lm.server with.
local.ollamaDescription: Local models via Ollama's built-in OpenAI-compatible API.
local.ollamaHint: The model name from `ollama list` / `ollama pull`.
local.compatibleDescription: Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint - vLLM, Z.AI, Fireworks, etc.
local.openrouterDescription: Any model on OpenRouter - type its full provider/model id.

card.loadModelsFailed: Could not load models. Check the URL and API key.
card.name: Name
card.providerDoesNotUseKey: {{provider}} does not use an API key
card.optionalKeyPlaceholder: Optional - leave empty for unauthenticated endpoints

header.title: Agents
header.description: Personas and snippets the AI uses. Switch agents from the input bar.

customInstructions.label: Custom instructions
customInstructions.placeholder: e.g. Always reply in concise bullet points. Prefer pnpm over npm. My machine is an M-series Mac.

snippets.label: Snippets
snippets.description: Reusable instructions you can drop into any prompt with #handle.
snippets.empty: No snippets yet. Create one and insert it with #handle in the AI input.

agentDialog.name: Name
agentDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: One line - shown in the agent picker
agentDialog.instructionsPlaceholder: Persona & rules. Appended to Lithe's core system prompt.

snippetDialog.name: Name
snippetDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: One line - shown in the # picker
snippetDialog.contentPlaceholder: Inserted into the prompt as a <snippet> block when you use #handle.
snippetDialog.errFormat: Lowercase letters, digits, and dashes only.

commit.waitForAction: Wait for the current Git action to finish.
commit.enterMessage: Enter a commit message to enable commit.

panel.noRepoBody: The active workspace is not inside a Git repository.

discard.title: Discard changes?
discard.descAll: This will discard {{label}} and cannot be undone.
discard.descOne: Discard changes in "{{label}}"? This cannot be undone.

private.label: Private: hidden from AI
private.tooltip: AI can't see this terminal's output. Use it for secrets, SSH, or anything you don't want sent to the model.

terminal.inputPlaceholder: Run a command  -  ↑ history  {{shortcut}} switch to AI
terminal.overflowNotice: [Lithe: some output was dropped while this tab was hidden]
